title: FalsifierRecord
description: A single falsifier triggered by a condition that challenges the validity of a candidate or study result (M50).

targetId.description: Identifier of the candidate or quantity this falsifier targets.

branchId.description: Branch ID where the condition was triggered.

environmentId.description: Environment ID where triggered (null if environment-agnostic).

triggerValue.description: Trigger value that caused this falsifier to fire (e.g., fragility score).

description.description: Human-readable description of what was triggered.

evidence.description: Evidence source (e.g., record type and ID).

active.description: Whether this falsifier is currently active. Inactive falsifiers are preserved for record-keeping but not applied to demotions.
